# Code of Conduct

Eticaret is committed to a respectful, welcoming, and harassment-free community.

## Expected Behavior

- Be respectful in language, tone, and feedback.
- Assume good intent, but listen when impact is pointed out.
- Focus criticism on ideas, code, and process, not people.
- Help keep the project approachable for learners and first-time contributors.

## Unacceptable Behavior

- Harassment, hate speech, discrimination, or personal attacks.
- Sexualized language or unwelcome sexual attention.
- Doxxing, threats, intimidation, or stalking.
- Trolling, baiting, deliberate disruption, or bad-faith participation.

## Scope

This code of conduct applies to repository discussions, issues, pull requests, reviews, and any public spaces where someone is representing this project.

## Reporting

Report abusive or unacceptable behavior to the maintainer through a private contact method published on the `@bora-yarkin` GitHub profile. For security vulnerabilities, use the process in [SECURITY.md](SECURITY.md) instead of a public report.

## Enforcement

The maintainer may remove comments, reject contributions, temporarily restrict participation, or permanently ban contributors whose behavior violates this policy.
